p1h.summary: F7 source gate now exempts email action commands, meta-feedback, and correction turns; draft email routes to ApprovalQueue instead of being source-gated.
tests: source check does not block email action commands or honest tool failures
Nexi Anthropic gateway preloads draftEmail for send-email action commands
Nexi service logs softer correction wording before the source gate can fire

p1i.summary: Invalid email date/tool failures are sanitized; raw tool exceptions do not reach the user.
tests: Comms Nexi summarizeInbox handles invalid date strings and returns sender-subject-ask items
Nexi Anthropic gateway sanitizes deterministic email tool failures
Nexi Anthropic gateway turns empty deterministic email searches into logged honest failures

p1j.summary: Inbox summaries and triage expose sender, subject, one-line ask, grouped priority data, and classify sign-in/account-welcome mail as noise rather than client inquiry.
tests: Comms Nexi triageInbox ranks Aquatrace attention items and excludes noise
Comms Nexi summarizeInbox handles invalid date strings and returns sender-subject-ask items
